creator: mi@misha.cisco.com
text:
I realized, the header files need to be installed
(${PREFIX}/include/djvu).
I also renamed the port from libdjvu to djvu -- it installs several
binaries to
${PREFIX}/bin and is not just a library.

The latest version of the port is in
    ftp://ftp.video-collage.com/pub/FreeBSD/djvu-port.shar
(on the fly compression is available).

    -mi
